---
title: 'UFO’s and Demons'
date: '2012-01-21T09:39:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5805942186659521772'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/ufos-and-demons_21.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<br /><h1 style="background-color: white; border-bottom-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); border-bottom-style: dotted; border-bottom-width: 1px; color: #333333; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 20px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 5px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none;">UFO’s and&nbsp;Demons</h1><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Demons are pretending to be aliens at an increasing rate. Many great and not so great articles have been found on this subject. Bottom line, the devil knows there is a rapture coming. There needs to be a set up. What other&nbsp;explanation, besides God took his kids back, can be told to sooth the people and get them to line up to his plan during a seven year tribulation?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Evidence is all around us that there is more than meets the eye. Darwin doesn’t hold water and those who purpose NOT to know God are desperate for other answers. Really&nbsp;intelligent&nbsp;people, scientists, and scholars have all started turning, in the last 100 years or more, to Alien life forms from another world.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Interesting articles by&nbsp;people&nbsp;who believe this have been written. Some are nearly convincing to the unsaved or spiritually uneducated person. One such series of articles can be found at:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.bibliotecapleyades.net/vida_alien/godseden/godseden03.htm#Brotherhood of the Snake" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;">http://www.bibliotecapleyades.net/vida_alien/godseden/godseden03.htm#Brotherhood of the Snake</a></div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">The claims of Satan trying to turn himself into the creator of men and trying to turn his deception at the tree of knowledge into his heroic attempt to free people from an oppressive god are amazing. He seeks to turn all the evil in the world into God&nbsp;Jehovah’s&nbsp;fault and Satan tries plays himself as the victim trying to free people wherever he can. His poor&nbsp;Satan&nbsp;worshipers are being mistreated by&nbsp;society&nbsp;and miss-understood.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">What’s more, those who reject the idea that Ea is Satan an Angelic being or god are now turning to the notion that he was actually a space traveling alien from another world. The Pyramids are portrayed as Flight Navigation points, claims that these can be found on the moon, which may very well be, we know angels can affect nature and earth. Why not the moon?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">The claim begins to develop that the aliens gave people the massive&nbsp;intelligence&nbsp;to build pyramids we still don’t know how to build today. Also that Crop circles portray exact mappings of star systems… all seemingly pointing to&nbsp;signs&nbsp;that aliens are among us.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><a href="http://kogconcepts.files.wordpress.com/2011/12/alien_asgard_stargate.jpg" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;"><img alt="" class="alignleft size-thumbnail wp-image-934" src="http://kogconcepts.files.wordpress.com/2011/12/alien_asgard_stargate.jpg?w=100&amp;h=150" height="150" style="border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; border-width: initial; display: inline; float: left; margin-bottom: 10px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 15px; margin-top: 0px; max-width: 100%; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;" title="alien_asgard_stargate" width="100" /></a>The idea of Aliens has invaded nearly every corner of our media. The most popular shows, some of my favorites, are shows that explore this possibility. Star Trek and Star Gate are two prime examples. Norse and&nbsp;Egyptian&nbsp;”gods” are protrayed as various alien races coming to help and hurt mankind. The characters are meant to endear you to them so that you embrace their existence and message. Yes it’s a movie, but it leaves part of you wanting it to be true… there is lies the deception.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">What is interesting about this, is that the evidence is overwhelmingly building the case that these claims are true. So if people are seeing aliens, UFO’s, and star system related activity in various pre-modern historical monuments, then of course Aliens are the natural reason right?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Well, not exactly. That holds true if you reject any notion of God or spirit, or spiritual realm. What’s interesting is that people who do eventually find them selves wanting to “Ascend” to a higher plane of existence, which means leaving the body… which would be… ah yes… the spirit world they say doesn’t exist. You see how you can’t get away from the bible?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">So… Aliens or Demons?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">The Angelic Beings are called the<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/job/38-7.html" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">&nbsp;Morning Stars&nbsp;</a>. The angels were there are creation. They are spoke of as inteligent. For a full break down on Angels see my posts from:</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><a href="http://kogconcepts.wordpress.com/studies/angels/angels-part-1-with-terri-copeland-pearsons-12-10-2008/" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Angels Part 1 with Terri Copeland Pearsons&nbsp;12-10-2008</a></div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">So Angels too would have all the knowledge of star systems and planets. They have the ability to travel to heaven and back instantly. So why not the moon? They have all the knowledge to share with early humans how to build these structure. Beings that are not born and do not die have a wealth of knowledge to draw from? They were there before the earth was created.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Therefore Satan, a fallen angel, and his crew of miscreants, begin a plan to steal man’s imagination. He will even play both sides of the field and pretend to be the deceiver and the&nbsp;deceivers&nbsp;enemy. What is the reason. Why the big game? Just to keep people off focus so they don’t get saved after Jesus beat his brains out in hell for three days?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">No… not quite…</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Satan knows, has known for a while, that there is a fight coming. And end times brawl. He thought he won when he killed Jesus his enemy from before the creation of man. But when Jesus rose and beat him up and stole his keys and took captives out of jail to heaven… he knew he had a problem. So now he’s spinning a new web. Formerly he spun the tail of a god among god’s trying to free man from slavery to the other god’s. That didn’t work out so well so now his plan is to spin a modern version tale about him being an alien race “Perceived” as gods among primitive men. These modern men are believing his lies hook line and sinker just as the “primitive” men did. Not much has changed.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Why??</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">There is coming a day, well documented in the bible despite his attempts to squash it with religious traditions, that the church of God will rapture/evacuate this earth. Before that happens there will be an end time harvest and revival like nothing seen before. When the evacuation occurs God may have taken as much as half or more of the worlds population. There will be violent resistance to this harvest revival but it will happen anyway.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">So what is Satan and his&nbsp;<a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=28rAX_fBn4M&amp;list=PL164D8AE27E2DD647" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Muslim&nbsp;Anti-Christ</a>&nbsp;supposed to do about the sudden&nbsp;disappearance&nbsp;or seen evacuation of billions of people? Some end times scholars believe that the evacuation will not be so sudden or like a&nbsp;vanishing. But rather announced during a forty day time frame when the&nbsp;Resurrection&nbsp;body of&nbsp;Christ&nbsp;past and present walk the earth ushering those who will come into the&nbsp;kingdom&nbsp;before the day of Tribulation.&nbsp;Whether&nbsp;it’s a sudden vanishing or a period of&nbsp;announced&nbsp;departure&nbsp;Satan&nbsp;has a need to explain it away and in a hurry!</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">What’s his answer going to be? I’m glad you asked.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">If you survey people who say they’ve been abducted and screen out those with a history of mental insanity, you are left with a common theme.</div><ol style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><li style="margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 20px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">The vast majority have some connection to or history with the occult.</li><li style="margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 20px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">The Message is usually the same.</li></ol><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><a href="http://www.redmoonrising.com/newage.htm" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">What is the message from those who actually talked to the Aliens</a>, directly or through “Channeling”?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“There is coming a time when they will come and remove those who are holding back humans from the next stage of evolution. “</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">That’s right. Darwin, Stalin, Marx, and Alien abduction all start to play into one theme, one team, one plan… they seem disconnected, but they all boil from the same source and head to the same place. Satan the deceiver.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">So a search for “Aliens and Demons” or “UFO’s and Demons” and you will get hits from all sides of the debate. The fallen angels are posing themselves as gods among men. One such case is seen here by the messages of Rael (Born Claude Vorihon 09/30/46).&nbsp;<a href="http://www.rael.org/home" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;">http://www.rael.org/home</a>. He claims that alien men known as the “Elohim” are coming back to earth and expect to be welcomed with open arms by mankind who they seeded/created here on earth. The one he spoke to calls himself “Yahweh” The fallen angels are posing as gods and even take the names of the One True God as their own. It is direct, not even subtle, any longer. They are planning for the 7 year period to come. Little do they fully realize how little success they will have here, as it’s God’s judgement on Israel and Earth that is coming. It is HIS time table, not theirs.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">The fact remains: Satan is the father of lies. He wants to trick people. All talk of aliens is a trick of his to deceive you.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">…What now?</div><h3 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 18px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none;"><strong>How can I be saved from this disaster?</strong></h3><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">By now you are feeling creeped out if you saw any of those hits on&nbsp;Google. You may be feeling, even as a believer a sense of chill about the whole topic. That is a sign that they don’t want you to know this. What do you do to remove that chill? To feel safe again in your home? What if you aren’t saved by the shed blood of Jesus Christ, your are not a Christian, you are&nbsp;struggling&nbsp;with these matters now?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">I had a friend in high school that was born to a witch and her mother was so terrified of it all that she wanted out but couldn’t. She told the demon he could have her daughter if he’d leave her alone! So my friend grew up with a “Not So Imaginary” friend. He would become different people, wear funny clothes, he was&nbsp;entertaining&nbsp;to her as a child. But as time went on she was becoming more terrified herself. She grew in her own witch craft and became a drug addict. At 16 or 17 she accepted Jesus Christ as Lord and left that behind… or so she thought. Her demon would still come to her, even at our Christian Camp. She could see and hear him. We prayed and agreed that he leave and he stayed at the edge of Camp. In time she became free of him. I’ve since lost touch with her.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Maybe you’ve had experience in the occult, demons, witch craft, UFO&nbsp;societies, etc… Maybe you played with demonic toys “Just for fun” and now your house his causing you issues because of it. I have GOOD NEWS for you!!!!!</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Jesus is the King of Kings! He is the Lord of Lords! He created ALL things, including those angels that fell into deception! His body was broken and His blood shed for your&nbsp;deliverance!</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Don’t feel that you can’t be forgiven. There is no body, not even&nbsp;Hitler&nbsp;himself, that can’t receive the free gift of Salvation if they will just ask God for it. It is a free gift. You can’t earn it. All have sinned so no body can! Therefore because all have sinned all can receive it! There is no difference between one human and another when it comes go Jesus. All sinned All get the free gift of&nbsp;salvation! Jesus did not come to condemn you! He came that you might have life and have it more&nbsp;abundantly!</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">If you want to see this for yourself see:</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/john/passage.aspx?q=john+3:11-21" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">John 3:11-21</a>,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/romans/passage.aspx?q=romans+3:18-28" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Romans&nbsp;3:18-28</a>,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/1-corinthians/2-12.html" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">1 Corinthians 2:12</a>.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Jesus came preaching the Gospel of the Kingdom of God. That means: “Hey people! The Kingdom of God has come and that’s Good News! Why?</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Read&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/deuteronomy/passage.aspx?q=deuteronomy+28:1-14" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Deuteronomy 28: 1-14</a>&nbsp;because all of that blessing now belongs to you according to&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/galatians/3-14.html" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Galatians&nbsp;3:14</a>!!! The good news is that God has blessed you despite you! You can’t earn it or deserve it! But you can receive it. It starts by getting your heart right.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><strong>Pray this prayer:</strong></div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><strong>“Father in heaven, you are holy! You sent you only Son to earth to die for me that I could live for you! Thank you for that gift! I receive it! I take! It’s mine! I believe! I say right now that devils have no more place or authority in my life! I invite you into my heart, my house, my life, and all I am and have! Satan I command you to leave because I submitted to God! (<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/james/4-7.html" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">James 4:7</a>)”</strong></div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Now if you prayed that prayer, and you want demons to leave you alone start to praise God. Song is among the most powerful ways to renew your mind and heart to God’s word and set yourself in a peaceful place in Him! If you don’t know any spiritual – scriptural songs I’ll get you started here below.</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">If you prayed this prayer I invite you to visit this link from Jesse Duplantis to hear more about salvation:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.jdm.org/jdmDefault.aspx?tabindex=-1&amp;tabID=50" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;">http://www.jdm.org/jdmDefault.aspx?tabindex=-1&amp;tabID=50</a></div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Than also explore some awesome articles from Kenneth Copeland on getting started with your walk with God here:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.kcm.org/real-help/salvation" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;">http://www.kcm.org/real-help/salvation</a></div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">My favorite place to get new and old music to sing to God is at&nbsp;<a href="http://www.pandora.com/#" style="color: #008dcf; text-decoration: none;">http://www.pandora.com/</a>&nbsp;Just sign up and type in “Praise and Worship” in the search for new music box. Free Praise and Worship streaming 24/7!</div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Let me get you started. Click Play below and wash your spirit and soul in the blood of Jesus!<br /><span class="embed-youtube" style="display: block; text-align: center;"><iframe class="youtube-player" frameborder="0" height="385" src="http://www.youtube.com/embed/23n30v08v94?version=3&amp;rel=1&amp;fs=1&amp;showsearch=0&amp;showinfo=1&amp;iv_load_policy=1&amp;wmode=transparent" style="max-width: 100%;" type="text/html" width="630"></iframe></span></div><div style="background-color: white; color: #555555; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Verdana; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Thank you for reading… Darrell G. Wolfe</div>
